response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional fullstack experience, including deep TypeScript/Node.js product work, React with MongoDB and AWS at Optilyz, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) that directly matches the JD's AI agent requirement. A strong testing pedigree (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and a CS degree round out the profile. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience and no Kotlin, but the breadth and depth suggest these are quickly learnable.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js production work and polyglot range
Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling) matching a required skill
Exceptional testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, and testing course instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed despite both being in the primary stack
React exposure appears lighter than Ember.js across the work history
No Kotlin and only dated Java experience for the secondary backend stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
